upstream.title: Upstream Application
upstream.description: The backend service to protect with SSO.

name.title: Service name
name.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service to proxy to (e.g. 'my-app')

enabled.title: Enable Ingress
enabled.description: Create a Kubernetes Ingress resource. Mutually exclusive with route.enabled.

className.title: Ingress class
className.description: IngressClass name (e.g. 'nginx', 'traefik'). Leave empty for the cluster default.

hostname.title: Public hostname
hostname.description: The hostname under which your application should be accessible (without https://). Required when ingress.enabled=true.

path.title: Path prefix
path.description: The subpath that gets protected by the SSO proxy.

enabled.title: Enable TLS
enabled.description: Add a TLS block to the Ingress resource.

secretName.title: TLS Secret name
secretName.description: Name of the TLS Secret. Leave empty to use the cluster default certificate or a cert-manager annotation.

route.title: OpenShift Route Configuration
route.description: Alternative to Ingress for OpenShift/OKD clusters. Mutually exclusive with ingress.enabled.

oidc.title: OIDC / IAM Credentials
oidc.description: Credentials for the INDIGO IAM OIDC client. Register a client at your IAM instance (My Clients → New client) and provide the generated credentials here.

issuerURL.title: IAM Issuer URL
issuerURL.description: Base URL of the IAM instance (e.g. https://iam.example.org/). The OIDC discovery document is at <issuerURL>/.well-known/openid-configuration.

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Generated by IAM when you save the client registration.

existingSecret.title: Existing Secret name
existingSecret.description: Reference a pre-existing Secret (keys: clientID, clientSecret, issuerURL, suggestedCookieSecret). Overrides the inline credentials above.

profile.title: Profile preset
profile.description: Sets default OIDC scope and groups claim. 'iam': groups claim + groups scope (default). 'wlcg': wlcg.groups. 'aarc': eduperson_entitlement. 'custom': requires authOptions.scope and authOptions.oidcGroupsClaim.

allowedGroups.title: Allowed IAM Groups
allowedGroups.description: List of IAM group paths whose members are allowed to access the application. Empty means any authenticated user. IAM groups use path notation (e.g. /wlcg/cms/users).

emailDomains.title: Allowed Email Domains
emailDomains.description: Restrict access to users with an email in one of these domains. Use ["*"] to allow any domain.

preferEmail.title: Prefer email as username
preferEmail.description: Forward the email address as the X-Forwarded-User header to the upstream.

proxyPrefix.title: OAuth2 Proxy prefix
proxyPrefix.description: The path prefix used internally by oauth2-proxy. Must not be used by your application.

cookieExpire.title: Cookie expiration
cookieExpire.description: How long authentication cookies remain valid (e.g. '12h', '24h').

whitelistDomains.title: Whitelist Domains
whitelistDomains.description: Allowed post-login redirect domains. Prefix with '.' to match subdomains (e.g. '.example.org'). Leave empty to allow only the deployment hostname.

scope.title: OIDC Scope override
scope.description: Override the profile-preset scope. Required when iam.profile=custom.

oidcGroupsClaim.title: Groups claim override
oidcGroupsClaim.description: Override the profile-preset groups claim name. Required when iam.profile=custom.

extraArgs.title: Extra oauth2-proxy arguments
extraArgs.description: Additional CLI arguments passed to oauth2-proxy. These override environment-variable configuration.

secret.title: Cookie secret
secret.description: Plain-text string for cookie encryption (not base64-encoded). Must be exactly 16, 24, or 32 characters (AES-128, AES-192, AES-256). Leave empty to auto-generate and persist across Helm upgrades.

podSecurityContext.title: Pod Security Context
podSecurityContext.description: Security context applied at the Pod level.

securityContext.title: Container Security Context
securityContext.description: Security context applied to the oauth2-proxy container.
